channel.title: Duck on 独立开发与AI实战
channel.description: Recent content in Duck on 独立开发与AI实战

item.title: Peking Duck: The Dish That Fed Emperors
item.description: The cart rolls up to your table. On it: a whole duck, skin the color of polished mahogany, glistening under the restaurant lights. The chef works fast — thwack thwack thwack — cleaving the skin off in neat rectangles, then slicing the meat into thin pinkish petals. The aroma hits you before the first piece touches the plate: malt sugar caramelized into glass, five-spice, wood smoke, roasted fat.
